purpose: Topic → gate map derived from the GrammarProblems study dimensions. Machine-readable mirror of nahw/evals/grammar-problems-matrix.json#topics, for use by run/validate_linguistic_decisions.

by_difficulty.when: level=awdah_al_masalik OR depth=deep OR format=essay OR bloom in [analysis,evaluation,generation]
level=ajurrumiyyah AND depth=direct AND format=objective AND bloom in [recall,understanding]

note: auto_safe still requires QAC agreement + single sense + no homograph + no grammar-context dependency (see grammar-decision-gates.json).
